positive: Minimalist geometric composition featuring a stylized celestial crescent moon nestled within abstract mountain peaks. The design uses strong, clean lines and contrasting solid color blocks (deep midnight blue, ethereal gold, and soft dusty lavender). Composition must be perfectly centralized and designed as a repetitive, high-contrast apparel print. Style should blend Art Deco geometric abstraction with modern line art, creating a striking, elegant silhouette suitable for all ages. Perfect for screen printing or DTG printing, with crisp vector-like edges and solid color areas. Flat design, high contrast, clean composition.
